partial_reason: Real UI is light-themed; film language is dark. Composite faithfully mirrors progress.html structure (sticky header, source badge, 3 stage pills, progress bar, reasoning stream, meta row) but re-themed to the block_01-10 dark palette so the film does not fracture. All text content is pulled live from repo artifacts â€” no fabrication. Regenerate with a real browser capture if the UI is ever re-themed dark.
narration: Black Box fuses heterogeneous artifacts in one loop: telemetry, video, and controller context. It scans the full session, surfaces moments worth review, cross-checks signals against each other, and ranks only the hypotheses that survive the evidence.

block_modifiers.narrative_center: engine turns on â€” real progress UI content animating through ingest â†’ analyze, surfacing evidence then candidate moments then ranked hypotheses
block_modifiers.motion_profile: more active than block_03_setup (stage pill advances, progress bar grows, reasoning lines stream in) but NOT conclusive â€” stage never reaches 'report', progress tops out ~88%
block_modifiers.source_badge: REPLAY displayed explicitly with â–¶ glyph and amber outline. Mirrors .source-badge.source-replay from static/style.css. The underlying stream is genuinely a replay (data/final_runs/sanfer_tunnel/stream_events.jsonl, 50 real events). Never mislabeled as live.
block_modifiers.right_column: 5 phases crossfade: opening â†’ artifacts (telemetry/video/diagnostics/controller) â†’ cross-check overlay â†’ candidate moments (real timeline) â†’ ranked hypotheses (real confidences, refuted one struck through in muted-red)

beats.name: opening + source badge
beats.content: progress card appears with case='sanfer_tunnel', REPLAY badge outlined in amber, stage=ingest active, progress ~10-22%, 'analyzingâ€¦ engine online' panel on right with four dots keyed to artifact types

beats.name: scanning evidence
beats.content: stage moves to analyze, progress ~24-48%, reasoning stream shows real tool_call/result lines (bash ls, read summary.json/topics.txt/diagnostics_nonzero_unique.csv/rosout_warnings.csv). Right panel: 8 artifact tiles tagged TELEMETRY / DIAGNOSTICS / VIDEO / CONTROLLER, all real filenames from sanfer_tunnel bundle. Top-left overlay 'scanning evidence'

beats.name: cross-checking
beats.content: same artifact tiles plus amber hairline connectors on right edge linking telemetryâ†”diagnostics and telemetryâ†”video rows; 'CROSS-CHECKING' eyebrow top-right of panel; top-left overlay 'cross-checking'. Reasoning continues to stream; progress ~50-65%

beats.name: candidate moments
beats.content: right panel swaps to 4 real timeline entries with absolute timestamps (0.24s, 0.40s, 0.49s, 4.12s â€” all from analysis.json['timeline']). Top-left overlay 'candidate moments'. Progress ~68-80%

beats.name: ranked hypotheses
beats.content: right panel swaps to top 4 hypotheses from analysis.json â€” confidence bars 0.60/0.55/0.35/0.15 plus a REFUTED row struck through in muted-red. Top-left overlay 'only what survives evidence'. Stage STILL analyze (not done); progress holds ~85% â€” hands off to blocks_05/_06 without revealing findings

progress card (left, 1080x820) mirrors src/black_box/ui/templates/progress.html structure exactly: sticky header â†’ stage pills â†’ progress-head â†’ bar â†’ reasoning stream â†’ meta row
